description: Restructure the Moodle course catalog. Log in as admin (username: admin, password: Admin1234!). Create a new top-level category named 'Life Sciences' with ID number 'LIFESCI' and description 'Courses related to the study of living organisms'. Move the existing course 'Introduction to Biology' (BIO101) into this new 'Life Sciences' category. Inside 'Life Sciences', create a hidden sub-category named 'Archived Life Sciences' with ID number 'LIFESCI_ARCHIVE'.
